verses.1: Great is the LORD, and greatly to be praised,
verses.2: Beautiful in elevation, the joy of the whole earth,
verses.3: God has shown himself in her citadels as a refuge.
verses.4: For, behold, the kings assembled themselves,
verses.5: They saw it, then they were amazed.
verses.6: Trembling took hold of them there,
verses.7: With the east wind, you break the ships of Tarshish.
verses.8: As we have heard, so we have seen,
verses.9: We have thought about your loving kindness, God,
verses.12: Walk about Zion, and go around her.
verses.14: For this God is our God forever and ever.
